data.title: Write RED test for brainstorm non-epic type detection gate
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh with 4 tests verifying the brainstorm SKILL.md type detection gate:

1. test_type_gate_section_exists — SKILL.md contains a type detection gate section that runs .claude/scripts/dso ticket show before Phase 1
2. test_non_epic_presents_convert_enrich_options — Gate presents "convert to epic" and "enrich in-place" options for non-epic types (story, task, bug)
3. test_epic_flow_preserved — Gate routes epic tickets to Phase 1 with dialogue and output unchanged
4. test_usage_section_shows_non_epic — Usage section shows invocation for any ticket type

Test approach: Each test reads SKILL.md and checks structural markers of the type-check gate. For skill instruction files (markdown prose, not executable code), this is metadata/schema validation — an acceptable structural test per the defined exemption criteria. Behavioral correctness of the routing decision (does the LLM present the right options?) is tested at eval time (Task 3), not via unit tests.

Follow the existing convention in tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh: use echo "=== test_name ===" section markers, SECTION variable, pass()/fail() helpers, and extract_section() utility.

Add .test-index entry with RED marker: append ,tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh [test_type_gate_section_exists] to the existing brainstorm SKILL.md line in .test-index.

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh
- MODIFY: .test-index (append to brainstorm SKILL.md line)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh
- [ ] Test file is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh
- [ ] Test contains at least 4 test sections
  Verify: grep -c 'echo "=== test_' tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Running the test returns non-zero exit (RED state) pre-implementation
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh 2>&1; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] .test-index entry maps brainstorm SKILL.md to this test with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'test-brainstorm-type-gate.sh \[test_type_gate_section_exists\]' .test-index
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
